cells.rationale: Bun preload ordering, marker consumption, and cross-package command classification form a subtle correctness invariant across many surfaces.
The explicit acceptance supports GPT execution, while preserving result classifications, retries, deadlines, and process cleanup requires substantial multi-file reasoning.
Fail-closed discovery, structural linting, timing policy, and bounded orchestration introduce a cross-cutting correctness contract where a flawed abstraction would propagate broadly.
This is substantial but well-specified multi-suite migration work with explicit rules for memory clones, file clones, and preserved integrity cases.
Separating storage orchestration while preserving corruption, atomic replacement, cleanup confinement, and reopen semantics involves subtle correctness invariants.
Cross-cutting scheduler and state-machine extraction must preserve delicate promise, cancellation, deadline, and microtask ordering invariants.
The implementation needs judgment-heavy assertion accounting and delicate seam extraction across heterogeneous process-shaped tests without requiring a novel design.
Pruning broad coverage across three packages requires careful judgment about equivalent survivors and explicit retirements more than novel architecture.
Consolidating user-facing guidance across several documents requires wording judgment, terse house-style matching, and command-surface consistency.
